name: @intentsolutionsio/prettier-markdown-hook
description: Automatically formats markdown files with prettier on Stop hook, with configurable organization and path exclusions

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install prettier-markdown-hook\\n  or /plugin install prettier-markdown-hook@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
